description.value: Price 12,000 gp; Slot ring; CL 12th Weight -; Aura strong conjuration DESCRIPTION Each of these silver-and-gemstone rings is attuned to a specific elf gate. Its gemstone always matches the gate’s portal-key. On command once per week, the ring teleports its wearer back to that gate, as per word of recall. Theoretically, a ring of retreat could be crafted instead to transport the wearer to a specific site of import, such as a temple or stronghold, but to date, these rings have been crafted only with elf gates in mind. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 6,000 gp; Feats Forge Ring; Spells word of recall
